query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name FROM users u WHERE u.clinicaId = 1 AND u.role IN ('superadmin', 'admin') LIMIT 1;
SELECT m.id as medicoId, m.nome FROM medicos m WHERE m.clinicaId = 1 AND m.ativo = 1 LIMIT 5;
